About

Hey, I’m Yean Ter

Who am I?

I’m a full-stack developer and creative builder based in China. By day, I write code that saves people time. By night, I watch anime, collect design inspiration, and tinker with open source projects.

I believe that good software doesn’t just work—it breathes. That’s why I obsess over details, from pixel-perfect UI to clean, maintainable code.

What I Do

💻

Build Products

Full-stack web apps that solve real problems.

🎨

Design Systems

Scalable UI components and design tokens.

📖

Write Code

Open source and technical documentation.

🚀

Optimize

Performance, accessibility, and UX.

Interests

When I’m not coding, you’ll find me:

  • Watching anime and manga (especially slice-of-life stories)
  • Collecting design inspiration and color palettes
  • Making and sharing coffee recommendations
  • Contributing to open source projects
  • Writing tech notes and design thoughts

Let’s Connect

Always happy to chat about tech, design, anime, or just grab virtual coffee. Think we could work together? Have an idea? Just want to say hi?

📧 Email Me💻 GitHub𝕏 Twitter
